How It Works

Your 5-Step Interior Journey

From free consultation to moving in — stress-free, every step.

1
Free Consultation

Book a free call or visit. Share your vision, requirements & budget.

2
3D Design

Our designers create 3D renders — see your space before it's built.

3
Material Selection

Choose from premium materials, finishes, and hardware options.

4
Manufacturing

75% factory-precision manufacturing. Quality-checked before delivery.

5
Installation & Handover

Expert installation with 51-point checklist. Move-in ready!

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Why do I need an interior designer in Hyderabad?
+

An interior designer at 3D Design Studio acts like a project director — overseeing every detail from concept to handover. We manage vendors, timelines, and quality so you get your dream home without the stress.

How much does home interior design cost in Hyderabad?
+

1 BHK starting ₹3.5L | 2 BHK from ₹5L | 3 BHK from ₹7.5L | Modular Kitchen from ₹80,000. Book a free consultation for a personalized quote!

What is your project completion timeline?
+

We offer a 45-day Move-In Guarantee for all modular solutions. For complete home interiors, our standard timeline is 90 days from design approval to handover.

Do you provide free 3D visualization?
+

Yes! We create detailed 3D visualizations of your space before execution — see exactly how your home will look before a single piece is made. Completely free.

What areas in Hyderabad do you serve?
+

We serve all areas: Toli Chowki, Shaikpet, Jubilee Hills, Banjara Hills, Gachibowli, Kondapur, Madhapur, Manikonda, Secunderabad and all surrounding localities.

Modular Kitchen Designs in Hyderabad 2025

Modular Kitchen Designs are a seamless fusion of functionality and style, crafted to enhance modern Hyderabad homes. Whether you are redesigning a compact apartment or a spacious residence, our modular kitchen designs offer smart solutions tailored to your lifestyle. From clean, minimalist layouts to more detailed and ornate finishes, every design reflects contemporary aesthetics with a focus on practicality. Ideal for those who value space optimisation and sleek interiors, these designs suit various kitchen layouts — L-shaped, U-shaped, parallel, or open kitchen plans. All designs are fully customisable to match your space, taste, and budget. Starting from ₹80,000 with 45-day delivery and ISI-certified materials.

Modular Kitchen Price Guide 2025

Use our kitchen price calculator above or refer to this guide for budget planning.

Kitchen Type Kitchen Size Finish Type Starting Price Delivery
Straight Kitchen Up to 80 sq ft Standard Laminate ₹80,000 30–45 days
L-Shape Kitchen 80–120 sq ft Acrylic / Membrane ₹1,30,000 35–45 days
U-Shape Kitchen 100–150 sq ft High-Gloss PU ₹1,80,000 40–50 days
Parallel Kitchen 100–140 sq ft Acrylic / PU ₹1,60,000 40–45 days
Island Kitchen 150+ sq ft Luxury / Marble ₹2,20,000+ 45–60 days

*Prices are indicative and may vary based on size, finish, hardware and accessories chosen. Book a free consultation for an accurate quote.

FAQs About Modular Kitchen Design

What are Modular Kitchens?
+

Modular kitchens are pre-manufactured units (modules) that come in standard sizes and can be assembled to create a complete kitchen. They include base cabinets, wall cabinets, tall units and drawer systems — all customisable to your kitchen size and style.

What is the cost of modular kitchen in Hyderabad?
+

Modular kitchen costs in Hyderabad start from ₹80,000 for a basic straight kitchen with laminate finish. L-shape starts from ₹1,30,000 and island kitchens from ₹2,20,000+. The exact price depends on size, layout, finish and hardware chosen. Use our calculator above or book a free consultation for a precise quote.

Which modular kitchen layout is best for Indian homes?
+

L-Shape kitchens are most popular in Indian apartments as they make great use of corner spaces and offer an efficient work triangle. For compact apartments, straight kitchens are ideal. U-shape and parallel layouts suit larger kitchen spaces. Island kitchens are trending for luxury homes with open living spaces.

What materials do you use for modular kitchens?
+

We use DC Gold plywood (eucalyptus core, termite resistant) for the cabinet body and BWP (Boiling Water Proof) plywood for wet areas near the sink. For shutters, we offer laminate, acrylic, PU paint, membrane and glass finishes. All hardware is from Hettich, Hafele or Sleek — all ISI certified.

How long does modular kitchen installation take?
+

At 3D Design Studio, we guarantee delivery and installation within 45 days from design approval. The manufacturing is done 75% at our factory for precision. On-site installation typically takes 3–5 days. We do a 51-point quality check before handover.

Do you provide a warranty on modular kitchens?
+

Yes! We provide a warranty on all our modular kitchen installations. The cabinet body comes with a 5-year warranty, hardware with 3 years, and finishes with 1 year. Our team also offers after-sales support for any adjustments or touch-ups needed post-installation.
